# Skills Tests

Skills tests measure basic competencies that are typically associated with essential work activities for a wide variety of jobs.

Book a Demo   Explore Pricing

### About Skills Tests

Skills assessments measure proficiency in areas like general job readiness skills, verbal and math comprehension, typing and data entry, basic computer literacy, and Microsoft Office. They are designed to determine whether or not an individual has the requisite level of skill required to effectively perform at a job that will require the frequent use of the skills in question. 

Woman smiling in front of chart

* CBST test
 
 ## Criteria Basic Skills Test (CBST)
 
 A test of basic math, verbal, and communications skills, designed to assess job readiness and trainability.
 
 Learn More
 
* CBST2 Test Thumbnail
 
 ## Criteria Basic Skills Test 2 (CBST2)
 
 A fast, customizable, accessible test that assesses workplace entry-level trainability and workplace problem-solving skills.
 
 Learn More
 
* CLIK test
 
 ## Computer Literacy and Internet Knowledge Test (CLIK)
 
 A basic computer literacy test, assessing knowledge of internet browsers, email, chat, and word processing.
 
 Learn More
 
* english language proficiency test thumbnail
 
 ## English Language Proficiency Test (CLPT)
 
 A fast, customizable assessment that measures English proficiency.
 
 Learn More
 
* Excel 5 to 7 minutes
 
 ## Microsoft Excel Test
 
 Identify candidates who are proficient in Microsoft Excel using a fast, adaptive, and interactive skills assessment.
 
 Learn More
 
* Word 5 minutes
 
 ## Microsoft Word Test
 
 Identify candidates who are proficient in Microsoft Word using a fast and adaptive skills assessment.
 
 Learn More
 
* PowerPoint 5 minutes
 
 ## Microsoft PowerPoint Test
 
 Identify candidates who are proficient in Microsoft PowerPoint using a fast and adaptive skills assessment.
 
 Learn More
 
* Typing Test
 
 ## Typing Test
 
 A test of typing speed, measuring both speed and accuracy.
 
 Learn More
 
* Ten Key Test
 
 ## Ten Key Test
 
 A numerical data entry skills test, measuring both speed and accuracy.

 ## TestMaker
 
 TestMaker is a test authoring tool that allows you to create, edit, and deliver your own tests.

###### CASE STUDY

### painPRO Therapeutics slashes time to hire by 94%

Using several skills tests in combination with a personality assessment, painPRO saved both time and money for hiring staff across its network of healthcare clinics.
